files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section at the beginning. Expand Quick Reference to include bash shebang explanation. Add Key Takeaways section before Concept Check. The 'Module Contents' table is good but should link files using proper markdown [link syntax](filename). Consider adding a visual diagram showing Allrun/Allclean relationship.
files.01_Automation_Strategy.md: Missing Learning Objectives completely. The 'Principles' section is good but needs 'Why' explanations for each principle. 'Workflow Phases' has good mermaid diagram but needs follow-up text explaining each phase. Add 'When to use each phase' guidance. Missing Key Takeaways. The 'Script Structure' section should explain WHEN to use .pre/.post vs single script.
files.02_Automation_Framework.md: Missing Learning Objectives. 'Standard Functions' section needs explanation of HOW runApplication works internally (what it does beyond logging). 'Error Handling' should compare set -e vs || exit patterns (when to use which). 'Parametric' example needs explanation of what sed does and why RE_VALUE pattern. 'Parallel Batch' needs safety warning about concurrent file access. Missing Key Takeaways section entirely.

global_strategy: All three files lack proper 3W Framework (What/Why/How). They jump straight into code without learning objectives or context. Add consistent structure: Learning Objectives → What (concept) → Why (benefits) → How (code examples) → Key Takeaways → Concept Check. The bilingual approach (Thai/English) is inconsistent - some sections have both languages, others don't. Standardize this. Files are too brief for practical learning - each should be 2-3x longer with more examples and edge cases. The 'Quick Reference' tables are good but should be expanded. Consider adding 'Common Pitfalls' sections to each file.
